debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
e : Expression p
ae : AffineExpression p
⊢ some ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? p e → AffineExpression.eval p ae = e.eval

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
some ae := by
    rw [h]
    <;> simp [Option.some_inj]
  have h₂ : ae.eval = e.eval := by
    -- Use the fact that the affine expression is correctly constructed to match the evaluation of the original expression
    have h₃ : ∀ (e : Expression p), AffineExpression.ofExpression? e = some ae → ae.eval = e.eval := by

      -- Use induction on the expression to prove the evaluation equality
      induction e using Expression.induction_on with
      | const n =>
        -- Base case: constant expression
        simp_all [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, Expression.eval]
        <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> simp_all
      | var x =>
        -- Base case: variable expression
        simp_all [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, Expression.eval]
        <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
        <;> ring_nf at *
        <;> simp_all
      | add e1 e2 =>
        -- Inductive step: addition of two expressions
        simp_all [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, Expression.eval]
        <;>
        (try cases h₅ <;> cases h₆ <;> simp_all [Option.some_inj]) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [AffineExpression.eval, AffineExpression.add]
          <;>
          (try {
            expr_simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] at *
            <;>
            simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
            <;>
            ring_nf at *
            <;>
            simp_all
          })
          <;>
          aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Option.some_inj]
          <;>
          aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [AffineExpression.eval, AffineExpression.add]
          <;>
          (try {
            expr_simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] at *
            <;>
            simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
            <;>
            ring_nf at *
            <;>
            simp_all
          })
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      | mul e1 e2 =>
        -- Inductive step: multiplication of two expressions
        simp_all [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, Expression.eval]
        <;>
        (try cases h₅ <;> cases h₆ <;> simp_all [Option.some_inj]) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number, AffineExpression.add]
          <;>
          (try {
            expr_simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] at *
            <;>
            simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
            <;>
            ring_nf at *
            <;>
            simp_all
          })
          <;>
          aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [Option.some_inj]
          <;>
          aesop
        }) <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number, AffineExpression.add]
          <;>
          (try {
            expr_simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] at *
            <;>
            simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
            <;>
            ring_nf at *
            <;>
            simp_all
          })
          <;>
          aesop

    -- Apply the general result to the specific expression
    have h₄ := h₃ e h₁
    simp_all
  exact h₂
